title: Add ginkgo tests to travis
body:
The ginkgo e2e tests were never added to the travis test run.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@baude looks like ginkgo is having problems with btrfs?  It looks like it's installed, not sure what's what.

```
$ ginkgo -v tests/e2e/.
Failed to compile e2e:
# github.com/projectatomic/buildah/vendor/github.com/containers/storage/drivers/btrfs
vendor/github.com/containers/storage/drivers/btrfs/version.go:6:27: fatal error: btrfs/version.h: No such file or directory
 #include <btrfs/version.h>
                           ^
compilation terminated.
```
gingko needs to have the buildtags passed to it that go has, so that it does not build with ostree support.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 44468f8) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@baude Is this still something you are interested in?
